method.name: streamChat
method.description: Streams a live answer through the active provider. Callers depend on this method for provider fallback, rate-limit handling, and streaming response normalization.

request.field: Must be omitted or provided as a string. The active mode suffix is assembled before this method is called.

method.response: Returns an AsyncIterable of text deltas. Provider-specific SSE, JSON, and fallback formats are normalized before yielding to callers.

errors.error: WhatToAnswerLLM was constructed without an LLMHelper instance.
The active provider and configured fallbacks are unavailable.
The active provider returned a retryable rate-limit response.
